prompt: Course2Career AI Career Programme - premium 30-second British career-development advertisement for UK adults, beginners and career changers entering AI and data careers without previous coding experience.
objective: Generate qualified enquiries for the AI Career Programme.
audience: UK adults, beginners and career changers entering AI and data careers without previous coding experience.
legalQualifier: Eligibility and programme terms apply. Salary and employment outcomes vary.
musicBrief: Original premium instrumental corporate music. Begin warm and thoughtful, build confidence and finish uplifting but credible. No vocals and no imitation of any existing song or artist.

scenes.title: A New Career Direction
scenes.objective: Introduce a relatable beginner or career changer.
scenes.visualPrompt: A realistic British adult career changer at a clean home workspace in natural morning light discovers a professional AI and data training programme. Uncertainty shifts naturally to confidence. Consistent lead character, cinematic camera movement, text-free frame.
scenes.negativePrompt: No robots, holograms, generated words, logos, distorted hands, duplicate people or exaggerated expressions.
scenes.cameraDirection: Wide establishing shot, natural over-the-shoulder laptop view, confident close-up.
scenes.voiceoverText: Ready for a career in AI and data? Course2Career's AI Career Programme is built for beginners and career changers, with no previous coding experience needed.
scenes.subtitleText: Ready for a career in AI and data? Course2Career's AI Career Programme is built for beginners and career changers, with no previous coding experience needed.

scenes.title: Training and Expert Support
scenes.objective: Show practical training and personal support.
scenes.visualPrompt: The same lead learner completes credible online AI and data coursework, analyses a clean business dashboard and speaks with a supportive expert tutor. Consistent identity and wardrobe, modern British home-learning environment, text-free frame.
scenes.negativePrompt: No generated words, certification logos, fake certificates, employer logos, floating interfaces, robots or character changes.
scenes.cameraDirection: Medium shots, over-the-shoulder learning views, tutor-call close-up and smooth tracking shot.
scenes.voiceoverText: Complete six accredited CompTIA courses, including Data Plus and DataX, with 120 to 150 hours of training, expert tutor support and recruitment guidance.
scenes.subtitleText: Complete six accredited CompTIA courses, including Data Plus and DataX, with 120 to 150 hours of training, expert tutor support and recruitment guidance.

scenes.title: Your Next Career Starts Here
scenes.objective: Show a credible career outcome and call to action.
scenes.visualPrompt: The same lead learner attends a professional interview and enters a bright modern British data workplace. Finish on a stable premium end-card background with clean negative space, text-free generated footage.
scenes.negativePrompt: No generated words, fake employer logos, guaranteed-employment imagery, robots, identity changes or excessive celebration.
scenes.cameraDirection: Composed interview shot, confident workplace entrance, stable end-card background.
scenes.voiceoverText: Build employer-ready skills with a guaranteed route to job placement on completion, or your money back, subject to terms. Visit Course2Career.com and enquire today.
scenes.subtitleText: Build employer-ready skills with a guaranteed route to job placement on completion, or your money back, subject to terms. Visit Course2Career.com and enquire today.

overlays.text: Eligibility and programme terms apply. Salary and employment outcomes vary.
